title: 12pcs Farm Animals,Mini Animal Toys Plastic Realistic,Farm Toys Set Educational Playset for Tollders Kids for 2 3 4 5 6 7 Year Olds
features: Package Contents: The farm animals set includes 2 cows, 1 goose, 1 pig, 1 hen, 1 rooster, 1 horse, 1 goat, 1 donkey, 1 dog, 1 duck and 1 sheep

Safe Material: The mini farm animal models are made of PVC plastic, with excellent workmanship, comfortable touch, and can be washed with water, so your children can enjoy their playing time with peace of mind
Realistic Animal Models: Our farm animals toy look natural and lifelike, the farm animal toys can stand firmly, your children can learn more about animals through these toys

Educational Toys: Farm animal toys are very suitable for playing with partners. They can help stimulate children's imagination and creativity. Parent-child interaction can make you and your children closer

Widely Used: The farm animals set is suitable for children aged 3 4 5 6 7 and above, very suitable for giving to your children on birthdays and holidays, also very suitable for collection, decorating bookcases, desks and rooms
